title: Publication-Gate Checklist v0

sources.label: Multiple Myeloma Synthetic Case-To-Cure Pipeline v0
Multiple Myeloma Roadmap Public Task Queue v0

limitations: Does not provide expanded-access guidance for any person.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured.
A checklist pass does not authorize publication of real case facts without private governance.
Does not establish clinical truth, trial eligibility, site availability, sponsor availability, regulatory feasibility, or patient fit.
Does not permit patient-specific candidate options, rankings, decisions, raw records, identifiers, dates tied to a person, images, free-text notes, or re-identification keys in the public repo.
Requires metadata, provenance, uncertainty, limitations, clinical-use boundary text, and validation before public release review.
